title: Bitter Crispy Mediterranean Prawn Stir-fry
description: This mediterranean dish features prawns marinated in bitter greens and served with a crispy exterior, perfect for post-workout recovery.

ingredients.name: Fresh Lemon Zest and Juice
ingredients.amount: 1 lemon each for zest and juice

ingredients.name: Tomato Sauce
ingredients.notes: tomato paste or puree can be used as a substitute if unavailable

instructions: Wash prawns and trim any shells.
Mix minced garlic, lemon zest, fresh dill, olive oil, tomato sauce (or paste), and a pinch of salt in a large bowl. Add the washed bitter greens and mix well.
Season the mixture with salt and pepper to taste.
Divide the mixture into 4-5 portions for easier handling.
Place prawns on one side of each portion and evenly distribute the bitter greens over the prawns, ensuring they are fully covered.
Preheat a non-stick pan over medium heat. Drizzle in 2 tablespoons of olive oil. Once the oil is hot but not smoking, add portions of the mixture in one layer (do not overcrowd the pan).
Cook for about 3-4 minutes per side until the prawns are fully cooked and the bitter greens crisp up.
Remove from heat immediately after flipping to ensure a crispy texture. Season with additional salt if needed before serving.
Drizzle more olive oil on top of each serving and garnish with fresh dill leaves for added flavor and appearance.
